## LibraryData.SubLibraryLoaderFactory type

Factory function that creates a CollectionLoader for a specific sub-library type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type SubLibraryLoaderFactory<TBaseId extends string, TItem> = (mutable: MutabilitySpec) => CollectionLoader<TItem, SourceId, TBaseId>;
```
